label: no
cot_prefix: Okay, let's tackle this question. The passage talks about memory being a matter of practice and how sometimes our memory plays tricks on us. The example given is the writer finding the front door unlocked in the morning, but they clearly remember locking it the night before. So the question is asking which statement is true according to the passage. The options are A, B, C, D. Let me read them again. A) One night the writer forgot to lock the front door. B) One night the writer forgot having locked the front door. C) The writer remembered to lock the door. D) The writer remembered unlocking the front door. The passage says that the writer found the door unlocked but remembered locking
